name: Crown Molding Calculator
seo_title: Crown Molding Calculator – Linear Feet & Pieces
seo_description: Calculate how much crown molding you need. Enter room dimensions to get perimeter, linear metres needed, number of pieces and corner count with 15% waste.
description: Free online crown molding calculator. Enter room length and room width to get instant results.
desc: Free online crown molding calculator. Enter room length and room width to get instant results.
steps: Identify what you want to calculate with the Crown Molding Calculatetor.
Enter the room length in the input field.
Enter the room width in the input field.
Enter the corner type in the input field.
Fill in the remaining fields with your measurements.
Click Calculatete to see your result instantly.
mistakes: Entering values in the wrong units — check that all measurements use the same unit system.
Forgetting to include a waste or safety margin — add 5-10% extra for real-world projects.
Using incorrect default values — verify the suggested defaults match your specific situation.
Rounding intermediate values too early — keep full precision until the final result.

result_context: Results: Room perimeter, Linear metres needed, Pieces needed.
